mapper.select: SELECT CR.REPORT_ID, CR.COMMENT_ID, RT.TYPE_NAME AS REPORT_TYPE_NAME, CR.REPORT_REASON, CR.REPORT_DATE, BC.BOARD_NO, BC.COMMENT_CONTENT, BC.COMMENT_REG_DATE, M.MEMBER_ID AS COMMENT_WRITER_ID FROM COMMENT_REPORT CR JOIN REPORT_TYPE RT ON CR.REPORT_TYPE_ID = RT.REPORT_TYPE_ID JOIN BOARD_COMMENT BC ON CR.COMMENT_ID = BC.COMMENT_ID JOIN MEMBER M ON BC.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO WHERE CR.REPORT_ID = #{reportId}

SELECT CR.REPORT_ID, CR.COMMENT_ID, RT.TYPE_NAME AS REPORT_TYPE_NAME, CR.REPORT_REASON, CR.REPORT_DATE, CR.REPORT_PROCESS_YN FROM COMMENT_REPORT CR JOIN REPORT_TYPE RT ON CR.REPORT_TYPE_ID = RT.REPORT_TYPE_ID ORDER BY CR.REPORT_ID DESC
